definition_en: to love; to want; to like
definition_sn: kuve nechido chikuru kune chimwe chinhu kana munhu

definition_en: to see; to look; to find
definition_sn: kushandisa meso kunzwa kuvepo kwezvinhu

definition_en: to hear; to feel; to understand
definition_sn: kushandisa nzeve kunzwa inzwi kana kushandisa muviri kunzwa kupisa

definition_en: to speak; to talk; to converse
definition_sn: kuburitsa manzwi anonzwika mukanwa ane chinangwa
kugadzira mabhii kana mifananidzo pabepa uchishandisa chinyoreso
kududzira mabhii akanyorwa pabepa kana kutsvaga huwandu hwezvinhu

definition_en: to walk; to travel; to move
definition_sn: kushandisa makumbo kufamba kubva kune imwe nzvimbo uchienda pane imwe
kufamba nemakumbo nekukurumidza kukuru
kusvika pane nzvimbo iri kutaurirwa
kubva pane imwe nzvimbo uchienda pane imwe
kusvika zvakare kwarimbori pane dzimwe nguva
kuisa chikafu mukanwa uchitsenga nekumedza mudumbu

kuzorora usiku kana masikati wakavhara meso pfungwa dzisingashandi
kumisa muviri kubva pakurara meso akavhurika
kushandisa pfungwa nemuviri kugadzira zvibereko zvinobatsira
kufara uye kuita mitambo yakasiyana inozorodza muviri

kutora chimwe chinhu uchichinjanisa nemari
kupa chimwe chinhu kune mumwe uchipiwa mari
kupisa chikafu pamoto chichibva chogadzirwa kudyiwa
kubvisa upenyu hwechisikwa chipi zvacho
kupa mumwe chinhu pasina mubhadharo
kubata nekuunganidza chinhu chiri pane imwe nzvimbo
kushevedza munhu uchiita kuti auye kwauri
kuburitsa inzwi rekufara meso akavhurika miromo yakamwemwera

definition_en: to cry; to weep; to mourn
definition_sn: kuburitsa misodzi pameso nekuchema nekuomerwa
kushandisa pfungwa kugadzira mufananidzo wezvinhu kana sarudzo

chinhu chisina kumboshandiswa kana chitsva chichangoburwa

ruvara runoita semukaka; chinhu chisina tsvina
